title: Incident Response
description: Structured incident response process for managing service disruptions, outages, and critical issues. Includes triage, investigation, resolution, and post-mortem phases.
message_on_join:
**INCIDENT CHANNEL**

This channel was created to manage an active incident. Please keep all incident-related communication here.

**Incident Commander:** @[to be assigned]
**Status:** Active

**Quick Actions:**
- `/zoom start` - Start bridge call
- `/jira create` - Create incident ticket

**Remember:** Update the run summary with current status regularly.
run_summary_template:

retrospective_template:
### Incident Summary
Brief 2-3 sentence overview of what happened, the impact, and how it was resolved.

### Timeline
| Time | Event |
|------|-------|
| | Incident detected |
| | Investigation started |
| | Root cause identified |
| | Fix implemented |
| | Incident resolved |

### Impact Assessment
- **Duration:** 
- **Affected Users:** 
- **Revenue Impact:** 
- **SLA Impact:** 

### Root Cause
Detailed explanation of what caused the incident.

### Resolution
What was done to resolve the incident.

### What Went Well
- Detection and response time
- Communication
- Technical response

### What Could Be Improved
- Gaps in monitoring
- Process improvements
- Documentation needs

### Action Items
| Action | Owner | Due Date | Status |
|--------|-------|----------|--------|
| | | | |

### Lessons Learned
Key takeaways to prevent similar incidents.

items.title: Update run summary with current status
Add relevant team members to channel
If SEV-1: Notify customer success team
Post initial status update to stakeholders
Assign investigation tasks to team members
Escalate to additional teams if needed
Send updates every 30 min during active incident
